'''Chasin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==History==
Chasin was under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control during the [[Hunt for Zsinj|Zsinj campaign]]<ref name="TEA" /> and the [[Thrawn campaign]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was defended by a [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]], which was [[Battle of Chasin|destroyed]] in a collision with the [[Vengeance-class dreadnought|''Vengeance''-class dreadnought]] [[Javelin (Vengeance-class)|''Javelin'']] during the [[Imperial Civil War|Imperial Mutiny]].<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

Its government was among the first to throw its support behind [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

{{Planet-stub}}
